title: daviesia ulicina f. ruscifolia
intro: Daviesia ulicina f. ruscifolia, also known as Ruscus-leaved Daviesia, is a plant species within the Fabaceae family. It is native to New South Wales in Australia. The medicinal properties of Daviesia ulicina f. ruscifolia include its use in treating fever, rheumatism, and as an astringent. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are believed to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation and promoting digestive health.
